privileged_info_summary: The task uses fully synthetic data generated at runtime by setup_task.sh. The JSON input file (water_data.json) containing water quality report data is programmatically created with specific content and metadata values. The chart image (ph_levels_chart.png) is generated using matplotlib/PIL. All metadata claims are verified: the expected alt text is 'Annual pH levels showing stability between 7.2 and 7.4' and the expected document title is '2024 Water Quality Report'. The task requires Section 508 accessibility compliance including Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles, table header rows, and image alt text. The output file must be saved as Oakwood_CCR_2024.odt with a minimum file size of 5 KB. No real-world data sources are involved.
